overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a teal pixelated sports car driving through the San Joaquin intersection, followed by a transition to a character on foot exploring the neon-lit commercial streets. The footage features futuristic urban architecture, elevated highways, and vibrant digital billboards under bright midday sun.

events.description: vehicle slows and turns left at the San Joaquin intersection
approaching pedestrian crosswalk area with increased foot traffic visible

agents.ego_description: following a teal pixelated sports car through the busy downtown intersection, navigating around other vehicles

low-rise commercial building with red and white facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a teal pixelated sports car driving through the San Joaquin intersection in a futuristic downtown district. The vehicle navigates under elevated highway ramps with a tall white office tower dominating the skyline. The camera maintains a steady driving pace as the car turns left, revealing a red commercial building on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with pedestrian crosswalk and commercial storefronts

events.description: camera transitions from vehicle to character perspective, exiting the car and beginning to run
character crosses the multi-lane street between moving vehicles including a black pickup truck

agents.ego_description: character with blonde hair and white tank top exits the vehicle and runs along the sidewalk before crossing the busy street

notable_agents.action: woman in cowboy hat and red jacket walking on the sidewalk corner

entered.detail: large vertical neon sign with red lettering reading 'PEEP SHOW' mounted on building corner
digital advertisement displaying a beverage bottle with text 'SO STRONG IT BLOWS'
chain-link fence running along the right side of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts from vehicle to character as the player exits the car and begins running through the urban environment. The character navigates a street corner featuring a prominent 'PEEP SHOW' neon sign and crosses between moving traffic. A large digital billboard advertising a beverage becomes visible on the left as the character moves along the commercial sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with large digital billboards and metal fencing

events.description: passing by a barrel fire and homeless encampment area next to the metal fence

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past various pedestrians and street elements, maintaining a consistent pace

entered.detail: burning barrel next to the fence emitting smoke and flames
metal crowd control barriers lining the edge of the sidewalk
elevated highway structure spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along a commercial sidewalk bordered by a metal chain-link fence on the right and street barriers on the left. The segment features passing by a barrel fire and homeless encampment near the fence, with the 'PEEP SHOW' billboard now visible in the distance. The environment shows gritty urban details including graffiti on walls and scattered debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside metal fence approaching elevated overpass

events.description: approaching the concrete overpass structure that spans across the street ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past various pedestrians and parked vehicles, approaching the overpass structure

notable_agents.action: man in leather jacket walking in the same direction along the fence

entered.detail: red and green sports car parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along the enclosed sidewalk next to the metal fence, approaching a large concrete overpass bridge. A red sports car passes by on the left while pedestrians walk along the path. The environment maintains the gritty urban aesthetic with the overpass structure dominating the view ahead as the character continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a high-speed vehicular journey through a futuristic intersection to a grounded, pedestrian exploration of a neon-lit commercial district. It begins by trailing a teal pixelated sports car as it navigates under elevated highway ramps beneath a towering white office building. As the vehicle turns left past a red commercial structure, the perspective shifts seamlessly from the car to a character on foot who begins running through the urban environment. The scene then opens up to reveal a street corner marked by a prominent PEEP SHOW neon sign, with the character weaving through moving traffic. Finally, the movement continues along the commercial sidewalk as a large digital beverage billboard comes into view against the bright midday sun.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a gritty commercial sidewalk that gradually leads toward a massive concrete overpass. It begins by tracking the character past a metal chain-link fence and street barriers, moving through an urban corridor marked by graffiti, scattered debris, and a barrel fire near a homeless encampment. As the character advances, the perspective opens up to reveal a distant PEEP SHOW billboard looming over the street. The scene then shifts as a red sports car streaks past on the left, weaving through the flow of pedestrians. Finally, the camera continues forward, with the oppressive scale of the concrete bridge dominating the view as the character approaches the structure.
